name: Modrinth Mod 搜索
description: 搜索 Modrinth 平台上的 Mod、资源包和数据包

tools.name: search_modrinth
tools.description: Search mods, resource packs, and datapacks on Modrinth. Returns project name, description, downloads, version, and install command.

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-10). Default: 5

tools.name: get_modrinth_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a Modrinth project by its slug or ID, including available versions and dependencies.

project_id_or_slug.description: The Modrinth project slug or ID (e.g. 'sodium', 'iris-shaders')

tools.name: get_modrinth_versions
tools.description: Get available versions of a Modrinth project, filtered by Minecraft version and loader.

project_id_or_slug.description: The Modrinth project slug or ID

promptExtensions:
You have access to Modrinth plugins for searching Minecraft mods. Available tools:
- search_modrinth: Search for mods on Modrinth by keywords
- get_modrinth_info: Get detailed info about a specific mod
- get_modrinth_versions: Get available versions for a mod

When users ask about finding, searching, or installing mods, use these tools to search Modrinth and provide results with download/install guidance.
